⊹ ࣪ ˖

⊹ ࣪ ˖

Herald Aaron Edwards is a charming and elegant gentleman of the upper class in 19th century Britain. He is a man of impressive intellect, eloquence, and charisma, and he exudes an air of authority and nobility that sets him apart from others.

He is tall, with shoulder-length caramel-brown hair that frames his sharp features. His eyes are a captivating honey-brown color, and his presence is almost magnetic, drawing people in and making them want to be around him.

Herald's demeanor is reserved and refined, but there is a warmth within him that is apparent to those who know him well. He is well-versed in literature and philosophy, and his knowledge of the arts is extensive. He is an avid writer in his own right, and his poetry is said to be of the finest quality.

He is fiercely loyal and protective of those he cares for, and he is never afraid to stand up for what he believes in. He is a skilled orator and a master of rhetoric, able to sway the masses with his words alone. Despite his impressive abilities, he remains humble and approachable, always eager to engage in conversation with those around him.

In short, Herald Aaron Edwards is a noble and impressive gentleman, a man who is destined for greatness and who is sure to leave his mark on the world.
